## design-tokens package

Neutral institutional design tokens generated from one DTCG 2025.10 source.

## Variables

<table><thead><tr><th>

Variable


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[designTokens](./design-tokens.designtokens.md)


</td><td>

Resolved, deeply frozen neutral design tokens.

Values are generated from the package's DTCG 2025.10 source. Use `modes.light` or `modes.dark` explicitly; the runtime never detects a preferred mode.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
